html:
Exclusive to:

Spoiled Fish is an item introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. Dead Dogfish and Dead Swordfish will turn into Spoiled Fish instead of Rot if left to spoil. It is also possible to pick one up in a Trawl Net. Giving Packim Baggims a Dead Dogfish or a Dead Swordfish will result in it spitting out a Spoiled Fish. Spoiled Fish can be Hammered to get 2 Bone Shards.

In the Hamlet DLC, Spoiled Fish is dropped upon killing the Pugalisk.

Tips

  • In Shipwrecked, Bone Shards stack up to 20, but Spoiled Fish stack up to 40 and each can be hammered for two Bone Shards. This makes it more space efficient to store Spoiled Fish.

Gallery

  • Spoiled Fish unused texture

–Wilson
“Gross.”
–Willow
“Is good no more.”
–Wolfgang
“Farewell, chum.”
–Wendy
“ALL LIFE DIES AND THEN SMELLS”
–WX-78
“That fish matter is becoming a biohazard.”
–Wickerbottom
“I think it's time to throw this out.”
–Woodie
“I believe I should dispose of this.”
–Maxwell
“Not an experiment I'm willing to undergo.”
–Wagstaff
“Yöu smell öf yöur failure.”
–Wigfrid
“It's no good to anyone now.”
–Webber
“Gag material!”
–Walani
“Such a shame...”
–Warly
“Smells like th'devil hisself made wind.”
–Woodlegs
“MMM... SOMETHING ROTTEN FOR WILBA'S BELLY”
–Wilba
“Smells good. Mmmmm...”
–Wormwood
“Mmm... smells like my home cooking.”
–Wheeler
Spoiled Fish is an item introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. Dead Dogfish and Dead Swordfish will turn into Spoiled Fish instead of Rot if left to spoil. It is also possible to pick one up in a Trawl Net. Giving Packim Baggims a Dead Dogfish or a Dead Swordfish will result in it spitting out a Spoiled Fish. Spoiled Fish can be Hammered to get 2 Bone Shards.
In the Hamlet DLC, Spoiled Fish is dropped upon killing the Pugalisk.

In Shipwrecked, Bone Shards stack up to 20, but Spoiled Fish stack up to 40 and each can be hammered for two Bone Shards. This makes it more space efficient to store Spoiled Fish.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Cá Thối là một vật phẩm được giới thiệu trong DLC ​​Shipwrecked. Cá Nhám Chó Chết và Cá Kiếm Chết sẽ biến thành Cá Thối thay vì Thối nếu để hư. Cũng có thể nhặt một con trong Lưới Rà . Đưa cho Packim Bagims một Cá Nhám Chết hoặc Cá Kiếm Chết sẽ khiến nó phun ra Cá Thối. Cá Thối có thể dùng Búa để lấy 2 Mảnh Xương.

Dead [[Dogfish]] and Dead [[Swordfish]] will turn into Spoiled Fish instead of [[Rot]] if left to spoil. It is also possible to pick one up in a [[Trawl Net]]. Giving [[Packim Baggims]] a Dead Dogfish or a Dead Swordfish will result in it spitting out a Spoiled Fish. Spoiled Fish can be [[Hammer]]ed to get 2 [[Bone Shards]]. In the ''[[Hamlet]]'' DLC, Spoiled Fish is dropped upon killing the [[Pugalisk]]. == {{Pic|32|Prototype}} Tips == * In ''Shipwrecked'', Bone Shards stack up to 20, but Spoiled Fish stack up to 40 and each can be hammered for two Bone Shards.
